Perf Check: Response < 300ms; Redis cache hit > 80%; no N+1 DB queries
Security Check: Product ID validated; no price manipulation via query param; rate limiting; no credentials in response
Content Check: Price data accurate and current; INR currency; source platform identified in response
Functional Check: Returns correct price for valid product ID; handles missing product with 404; handles stale cache gracefully
Notes: Verify Redis cache TTL is appropriate — stale prices can mislead users

Perf Check: Response < 500ms; async tracking jobs queued; no blocking DB calls
Security Check: Auth required for tracked-price subscription; product ID validated; rate limiting on tracking registrations; no PII in logs
Content Check: Tracked prices accurate; price history data correct; alert thresholds respected
Functional Check: Track request registered; price history returned; alert triggers when threshold met; untrack works
Notes: Verify auth required for personal price tracking — unauthenticated use should be read-only

Perf Check: Response < 500ms; batch price fetch cached; no timeout on large catalogs
Security Check: Catalog access scoped to authenticated admin/cron only; no bulk price scraping abuse; rate limiting
Content Check: Prices returned match catalog source; INR pricing; no stale prices beyond TTL
Functional Check: Catalog prices fetch for valid product list; pagination works; empty catalog returns 200 with empty array
Notes: Ensure endpoint is restricted to admin/cron — not public-facing; verify rate limiting

Perf Check: Sync job < 30s timeout; async where possible; no memory overflow on large catalogs
Security Check: Admin/cron auth required; request validated (not open trigger); idempotent — safe to re-run; no partial state on failure
Content Check: Synced catalog data accurate; no stale products left after sync; deleted products removed
Functional Check: Sync completes successfully; partial failure handled gracefully; audit log of sync written; cron trigger fires correctly
Notes: Protect endpoint — must require CRON_SECRET or admin token; verify idempotency

Perf Check: Response < 300ms; cached per product; stale-while-revalidate pattern
Security Check: Product ID validated; no internal stock system credentials in response; rate limiting
Content Check: Stock status accurate (in-stock/out-of-stock/limited); source platform identified
Functional Check: Returns stock status for valid ID; handles unavailable product with 404; handles source API down gracefully
Notes: Verify fallback behavior when source stock API is unavailable

Perf Check: Response < 500ms; external barcode API cached; no blocking on miss
Security Check: Barcode input validated (numeric/alphanumeric only); no SSRF via barcode value; rate limiting
Content Check: Product data returned matches barcode; accurate name/price/image
Functional Check: Valid barcode returns product; invalid barcode returns 404; malformed barcode returns 400
Notes: Validate barcode format strictly — prevent SSRF if barcode value is passed to external API

Security Check: Product ID validated; auth required for POST review; review content sanitized (no XSS); no PII in reviews
Content Check: Reviews accurate and not fabricated; moderation applied to UGC; no offensive content
Functional Check: GET reviews for product works; POST review requires auth; invalid product ID returns 404; pagination works
Notes: Sanitize all review content — prevent stored XSS via user-submitted review text
